description: Small legal fragment, probably a contract of debt. Mentions al-ʿAlāqma, a town in the area of Bilbays. The debtor is Abū l-Bahāʾ b. Abū [...]. Dated: 4 Iyyar [..]76, but it is not clear which calendar is intended or which century is most likely; maybe 1576 Seleucid = 1265 CE, but this is a guess.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
